race.comment: TEQUISODA (5) was well in commission last Saturday over 2000m at Kembla but after settling back in the field was unable to pick up sufficiently. Coming back a little in trip looks a good option. Gets all the favours from gate one so prepared to give him another chance. ALLEGRO MISS (2) was only 2.2 lengths off the winner over a similar distance to this at Randwick last weekend. Races well here and this is her pet trip so she makes plenty of appeal. POLO (8) is one to consider as she gets out to this trip for the first time. ROTHROCK (3) missed on bringing up the hat-trick here last time but is still going well enough.
